edges.note: grandson via Jayammal; inherited Dhanammal bani; formal guru was Tiruppamparam Swaminatha Pillai
second guru
most famous disciple per Wikipedia
first guru
sister's son and primary disciple; carried Mali style forward
principal guru 1989–1999; shaped Sanjay's mature style
granddaughter via Kamakshi; Dhanammal bani custodian alongside T. Brinda
co-teacher with T. Muktha
gurukula training, ~10 years; leading disciple
disciple of Muthiah Bhagavatar
first guru; Muthiah Bhagavatar lineage stream
principal guru; Dhanammal bani stream — padams, javalis, gamaka vocabulary
via Ramanathapuram C.S. Sankarasivan
Semmangudi learnt from Brinda — Dhanammal stream feeding into his style
full-time student
also studied under Ramnad Krishnan
son and primary disciple of Shyama Shastri
Dhanammal's mother trained under Subbaraya Sastri; Trinity lineage enters Dhanammal bani
daughter; singer; mother of Balasaraswati, T. Ranganathan, T. Viswanathan
daughter; mother of T. Brinda, T. Muktha, Abhiramasundari
mother; initial training in Dhanammal style
mother; initial training in Dhanammal style
substantial training; agility and robustness in laya
substantial training alongside Brinda
mother and accompanist; musical training from infancy
mother; Dhanammal bani transmitted through family
principal guru; ~20 years of study; innovator of 7-hole bamboo flute
via T.S. Sabhesha Iyer (2-hop); Wikipedia prose: Sabhesh Iyer disciple of Maha Vaidyanatha Iyer, Musiri disciple of Sabhesh Iyer
son and disciple; primary carrier of Lalgudi bani; Sangita Kalanidhi 2022
daughter and disciple; trained under father after initial training from grandfather Lalgudi Gopala Iyer; Sangita Kalanidhi 2022
principal guru; Sudha Ragunathan trained under MLV from an early age; carries the GNB bani forward
polishing guru; Pinakapani called Voleti a genius; sourced from carnaticheritage.in and eambalam.com Legends Series; no Wikipedia page for Voleti — editorial override applied
principal guru; Wikipedia infobox lists Sripada Pinakapani as teacher of the Malladi Brothers
Malladi Suri Babu associated with Voleti at AIR Vijayawada for a long time and imbibed his style; stylistic transmission rather than formal gurukula
Central Government scholarship; Vedavalli received specialised training in padams and javalis under T. Muktha
son and primary disciple; inherited the Palghat mridangam school; Sangeetha Kalanidhi 1981
son and disciple; accompanied his father in double-mridangam concerts; carried the Palghat school forward
